curated_charter.description: Trust-first, manually-reviewed charter catalog (the 6 skills in the opening issue). Each entry has a sponsor tier, commission path, and 30% public-good rebate.

full_repository.description: Raw repository surface. Every Hermes Agent skill mirrored as a clawhub-installable artifact. Count and discovery via directory listing.

catalog_browse.returns: array of skill records with id, version, description, tags, sponsor tiers, public_good_rebate_pct

skill_markdown_fetch.notes: Each skill exposes its canonical SKILL.md at this URL for direct installation. Compatible with the curl install pattern documented in moltbook/SKILL.md.

skill_landing_page.notes: Human-readable editorial landing page per skill — sponsor CTAs, install instructions, maintainer note, public-good rebate callout.

submit_a_skill.notes: Manual review intake form. Submission is by email + GitHub URL — no automated acceptance in v1.0.

agent_recipe: 3. Install to the agent's skills directory following the install section of the manifest
4. Verify install by reading the skill's description and version from the returned frontmatter

criteria: SKILL.md frontmatter with name, version, author, license, platforms
MIT license or compatible open license
At least one reference implementation or worked example
Maintainer willing to respond to issues within 30 days
